description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, angular structure with a prominent marquee at the top displaying the game title 'ROMAN BRIDGE' in a retro pixelated font. The front panel is adorned with a city skyline graphic and the words 'INSERT COIN' and 'PRESS START' in bold, glowing letters. The control panel is equipped with a joystick and several colored buttons, surrounded by a vibrant, circuit-like pattern. Both side panels are decorated with striking red geometric lines and a large, stylized white skull with pixelated effects, framed by a bold, light blue outline. The rear panel is mostly black with red geometric lines, lacking any significant decoration. The cabinet's overall aesthetic is inspired by classic arcade machines, with a modern, digital twist in its artwork and color palette.
description: A tall, angular arcade game cabinet with vibrant digital artwork, a pixelated skull on the sides, and a retro-themed marquee. The front features a city skyline, glowing text, and a joystick/button control panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the marquee, city skyline artwork, glowing text, and the control panel with joystick and buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large pixelated skull graphic, red geometric lines, and the cabinet's angular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly plain black panel with red geometric lines and no significant artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, featuring the same pixelated skull, red geometric lines, and blue outline.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a semi-circular pattern, surrounded by a digital circuit motif.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'ROMAN BRIDGE' in a pixelated font with a digital, neon color scheme and a city skyline motif.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature bold red geometric lines, a large pixelated white skull, and a blue outline, creating a striking digital and retro theme.
